title: JD Profile (the JD seam)
description: The single, validated structure that captures everything the Redrob ranker knows about one job description. Fill this from a new JD (see RETARGETING.md) and the same code retargets. method_config.yaml (the JD-stable mechanism) is intentionally NOT described here.

domain.description: Short domain label, e.g. 'AI/ML — search & ranking'.

summary.description: 1-3 sentence plain-language gist of the role.

peak_years.description: Center of the YoE Gaussian (best-fit experience).

sigma_years.description: Std-dev of the YoE Gaussian taper.

notice_preference_days.description: Notice period at/below which no penalty applies.

preferred.description: City tokens (lowercase) scored at full credit.

signals.description: The must-have capability axes of the role. The feature code iterates over these generically; `id` is the stable column prefix.

label.description: Human phrase used in candidate reasoning.

query.description: Dense facet query, embedded by jd_compile.

evidence_regex.description: Case-insensitive regex matched over career-history text. null = model-only axis (no evidence channel).

dense_weight.description: Share of the deterministic dense_fit. 0.0 = student-only signal.

dense_extras.description: Weights for the two derived (non-retrieved) dense contributions.

cross_encoder_query.description: Positive-evidence-only query for the cross-encoder teacher (train.py).

relevant_skill_regex.description: Which platform skill-assessment keys count for this role.

red_flags.description: Toggles for the JD's explicit 'do not want' damps. Magnitudes live in method_config.
